creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: culot
Date: Thu Apr 25 18:08:58 2013
New Revision: 316524
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/316524

Log:
  - Update to 1.5 [1]
  - Add LICENSE (Artistic 1 & GPL 1)
  
  Changes:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/Log-Any-Adapter-Syslog/Changes
  PR:		ports/178149 [1]
  Submitted by:	Bill Brinzer <bill.brinzer@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-Log-Any-Adapter-Syslog/Makefile
  head/devel/p5-Log-Any-Adapter-Syslog/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/p5-Log-Any-Adapter-Syslog/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Log-Any-Adapter-Syslog/Makefile	Thu Apr 25 17:24:32 2013	(r316523)
+++ head/devel/p5-Log-Any-Adapter-Syslog/Makefile	Thu Apr 25 18:08:58 2013	(r316524)
@@ -1,12 +1,8 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	devel/p5-Log-Any-Adapter-Syslog
-# Date created:				10 Oct 2010
-# Whom:					Bill Brinzer <bill.brinzer@gmail.com>
-#
+# Created by: Bill Brinzer <bill.brinzer@gmail.com>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	Log-Any-Adapter-Syslog
-PORTVERSION=	1.3
+PORTVERSION=	1.5
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
@@ -14,11 +10,15 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 MAINTAINER=	bill.brinzer@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Send Log::Any logs to syslog
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-Log-Any-Adapter>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Log-Any-Adapter \
 		p5-Unix-Syslog>=0:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/p5-Unix-Syslog
 BUILD_DEPENDS:=	${RUN_DEPENDS}
 TEST_DEPENDS=	p5-Test-Exception>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Test-Exception \
-		p5-Test-MockModule>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Test-MockModule
+		p5-Test-MockModule>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Test-MockModule \
+		p5-Test-Warn>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Test-Warn
 
 PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
 

Modified: head/devel/p5-Log-Any-Adapter-Syslog/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Log-Any-Adapter-Syslog/distinfo	Thu Apr 25 17:24:32 2013	(r316523)
+++ head/devel/p5-Log-Any-Adapter-Syslog/distinfo	Thu Apr 25 18:08:58 2013	(r316524)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (Log-Any-Adapter-Syslog-1.3.tar.gz) = 685b505b31d45c4e54872e16fa4b49a25b830c9ffae02ad7ea14665b96da5ed1
-SIZE (Log-Any-Adapter-Syslog-1.3.tar.gz) = 14985
+SHA256 (Log-Any-Adapter-Syslog-1.5.tar.gz) = 945ac8337e827b8f402142b913ded775300b1f968320a1dce7f9de4c2bcdc5d9
+SIZE (Log-Any-Adapter-Syslog-1.5.tar.gz) = 17638
